positive: Minimalist, geometric celestial map print. A stylized, abstract depiction of the constellations and the Milky Way, composed of clean, interlocking geometric lines and shapes. The primary subject is a central, glowing crescent moon surrounded by interconnected zodiac symbols (e.g., stylized stars, simple asterisms). The background should be a deep indigo, midnight blue, and black gradient, creating a sense of depth. Use a limited color palette of metallic gold, iridescent silver, and deep sapphire blue. The style should be highly graphic, modern, and slightly Art Deco, suitable for screen printing on dark fabrics. Focus on strong contrast between the glowing lines and the dark background. Composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed to wrap naturally around an item of clothing. Ultra high detail, vector art quality, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, noise, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grayscale, realistic photography, messy, clutter
